meaning: n.流水槽v.洗涤,清洗,洗黑钱(把来路可疑的钱弄得貌似合法)
examples: The House voted today to crack down on banks that launder drug money.
How many guests who expect clean towels every day in an hotel launder their own every day at home?
Nine are also charged with conspiracy to launder money.
Seven kidnappers, including Paleokostas, were arrested in August when they tried to launder the money.
An laundering plant in Castleblaney, County Monaghan, had the capacity to launder 10m litres per year.
